title: Ranchi Diaries
overview: An aspiring model Gudiya from a small town 'Ranchi' wishes to make it big in the industry, but ends up capturing the unwanted attention of a mafia leader which forces her to run away for survival with her childhood lover Manish. The following set of events pushes them to plan for an amateur bank heist with her gang of friends that goes terribly wrong.
